entity-description.bob-steam-mining-drill: The steam powered mining drill will scale its speed and energy consumption to the temperature of the steam you pipe into it.\nExpect it to operate at 20% on steam from your first boiler.\n20% is 120kW for 0.4/s base mining speed.

mod-setting-description.bobmods-mining-miningdrills: If set to true, new upgradable mining drills are available.
mod-setting-description.bobmods-mining-areadrills: If set to true, new upgradable large area mining drills are available.
mod-setting-description.bobmods-mining-pumpjacks: If set to true, new upgradable pumpjacks are available.
mod-setting-description.bobmods-mining-miningaxes: If set to true, new better mining axes are available.
mod-setting-description.bobmods-mining-waterminers: If set to true, water mining pumpjacks are available.
mod-setting-description.bobmods-mining-steamminingdrills: If set to true, a new steam mining drill will be available.
